description:
An extensible, AI-native workspace and code editor.

Nimbalyst is an extensible, AI-native workspace built on Electron. It combines
a Lexical-based markdown editor, a Monaco code editor, and a pluggable extension
system that lets editors, file handlers, and AI workflows be added as
first-class extensions. Features include multi-provider AI chat (Claude,
Claude Code, OpenAI, Codex, LM Studio), git worktree-backed coding sessions,
end-to-end encrypted collaborative tracking, and visual editors for diagrams,
mockups, mindmaps, and data models.
